CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2008 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2007 Continued To Jan-15-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
George Rush, Esq. for Petitioner: Abbas Al-shadud, present as Guardian ad litem for: Adyan Al-Shadud, a minor Claimant, was affirmed and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $3,600.00
Costs $927.75
A net balance of $4,472.25 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutaul Bank, 1201 Market St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

Nov. 7, 2007
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Comm. Kaplan.
